rulings.Case Title: FRANCES SUSSNA VS. PRIME OLD COUNTY LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF FRANCES SUSSNA's Motion To File First Amended Complaint Continued to September 20, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than September 16, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSHUA DODD VS. LARAMAR SF URBAN APARTMENTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Response And Further Responses To Discovery Req.'S And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA DODD's Motion For Order Compelling Response And Further Responses To Discovery Req.'S And For Monetary Sanctions Continued to September 20, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than September 4, 2013 by 4 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SOLLNER VS. NORTH BEACH PARTNERS LLC, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT INNOCENTI LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges cause of action for fraudulent conveyance. See 18, 21, 22 and 24. Reasonableness of the value paid for the property is an issue of fact. Bankruptcy Stay does not extend to the moving defendant. Authorities relied upon by Bankruptcy Court and considerations taken into account are not applicable to the case at bar. See Federal Life Insurance Co. v. First Financial Group of Texas, Inc (1980) 3 B.R. 375. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SOLLNER VS. NORTH BEACH PARTNERS LLC, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT NORTH BEACH PARTNERS LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Bankruptcy proceedings as to this Defendant on file. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. KENNETT TAYLOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacating Order For Possession
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT KENNETT TAYLOR's Motion for Vacating Order For Possession. DENIED. To the extent Defendant seeks reconsideration of this Court's July 26, 2013 Order Denying Motion to Set Aside Judgment, it is DENIED as Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008. To the extent Defendant seeks a stay pending appeal, motion is DENIED since time to file an appeal has passed. To the extent Defendant seeks a stay pending resolution of case to which he is not a party and where his right to possession is not at issue, it is DENIED. No authority to support this proposition has been cited. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN MENA VS. IVAN GUTIERREZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanction Of Entry Of Default Judgment And For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft. Ivan Gutierrez
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF JUAN MENA's Motion For Terminating Sanction Of Entry Of Default Judgment And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Ivan Gutierrez Continued to September 24, 2013 to be heard with another pending discovery motion. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: DIANE WESLEY SMITH et al VS. GEORGE LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT GEORGE LEE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, moot. Case CUD-13-645304 has been dismissed on August 27, 2013. [P filed a UD on May 10, 2013 based on "3 Day Notice" demanding rent from January to April, 2013. On August 2, 2013 P filed this action based on the same Notice. D demurred on August 9, 2013 based on existence of another action pending. P dismissed the prior action on August 27, 2013. This motion is moot. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: NISHAN SWEIS et al VS. MARCUS BOOKS OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MARCUS BOOKS OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. CCP 1161a(b)(4) is applicable to sellers and those who claim a right to possession under sellers. Complaint sufficiently alleges Defendant's claim under sellers. Whether Defendant is a tenant is an issue of fact no properly addressed on demurrer. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI VS. THOMAS MURRAY JR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 13, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT THOMAS MURRAY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Demurrer improperly raises issue of fact re: whether Defendant was a co-owner of the premises on at the time this complaint was filed. Case #532235 does not address or purports to resolve issue of possession. Moving party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/HMD)
